name: Fresh Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely chopped vegetables (broccoli, cauliflower, tomato, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine all ingredients except cheese.
2. Cover the dish and microwave at high power for 11-13 minutes, stirring once, or until the pasta is tender.
3. Serve in bowls, sprinkled with cheese if desired.
